reviews.comment:
Fui a lavar el auto, un afano 500 pesos el lavado y lo dejan asi nomas, no te dan bolsa ni perfume, el acabado malisimo, no lo recomiendo para nada

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my car washed, it was a rip-off! 500 pesos for the wash and they just leave it like that, they don't give you a bag or perfume, the finish is terrible, I don't recommend it at all
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMnVhWnNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ya sea por un servicio técnico, cargar combustible o renovar el registro, este en un muy buen lugar. Hace poco renové el registro y duro más la charla de seguridad que todo el resto del trámite, excelente

(Translated by Google)
Whether you need technical service, fuel, or registration renewal, this is a great place. I recently renewed my registration, and the safety briefing took longer than the rest of the process combined—excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBejdybGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hacia rato que no venia. La nueva remodelación que hicieron es genial. Muy amables todos y sobre todo es una estación 100% adaptada para personas con movilidad reducida.

(Translated by Google)
It had been a while since I'd been here. The new renovation is fantastic. Everyone is very friendly, and above all, it's a station that's 100% accessible for people with reduced mobility.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNmU2UXhnRRAB
